name: Demo Booking - Calendar + CRM
description: Receives demo booking events from AuthiChain website, triggers /api/demo/book for HubSpot deal creation and confirmation email, then creates a Google Calendar event with the prospect as an attendee.

flow.description: Receives POST with name, email, company, date, time, message
POST to /api/demo/book - creates HubSpot deal + sends confirmation email
POST to Google Calendar API - creates 30-min demo event with attendee

activation: Must be activated manually in Make.com dashboard (free plan restriction)
